meta_title: For Students: client workflow to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Client Workflow to Solve Can't Debug Code
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn a professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster, build your portfolio, and ship projects.
content.answer_block: The root cause of debugging paralysis is lack of visibility. By integrating Antigravity for real-time state analysis and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform debugging from a guessing game into a systematic, repeatable engineering process. This workflow ensures you understand the 'why' behind every fix, accelerating your growth as a developer.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the terminal is a graveyard of stack traces, and you feel that familiar pit in your stomach. You've been staring at the same ten lines of code for hours, convinced that the solution is just beyond your reach. Every student hits this wall—the moment where the code stops working and the impostor syndrome starts creeping in.

But here is the secret: professional developers don't 'just know' the answer. They use a rigorous, automated workflow to isolate failures and force the code to reveal its secrets. By shifting your mindset from 'fixing a bug' to 'executing a workflow,' you transform from a frustrated student into a methodical AI Builder who ships faster and learns deeper.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure State
steps.description: Before you change a single line, define the exact input that triggers the bug. Use Antigravity to snapshot the current state of your application environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current execution context and identify the exact variable state leading to the runtime error in [File Name]. Provide a minimal reproduction script.

steps.title: Automate Traceability
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the execution flow. This prevents you from getting lost in recursive functions or complex state management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a step-by-step trace of the logic flow for the failing function, highlighting where data integrity is lost.

steps.title: Hypothesis-Driven Refactoring
steps.description: Never guess. Formulate a specific hypothesis about the bug and use Claude Code to implement a patch that includes a regression test.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a fix for the identified bug that adheres to [Project Architecture]. Include a unit test that fails without this fix and passes with it.

steps.title: Regression Guarding
steps.description: Ensure your fix doesn't break other parts of your app. Run the updated test suite using your AI tooling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent code changes and generate a suite of edge-case tests to ensure this bug does not return.

steps.title: Documentation for Growth
steps.description: Log the bug and the fix in a 'Lessons Learned' file. This builds your technical portfolio and prevents future friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a concise technical summary of this bug, the root cause, and the fix to add to my project documentation.

pro_tips: Always create a 'clean room' branch before using AI to refactor to ensure you have a safe rollback point.
Ask your AI tools to explain the 'why' behind a fix rather than just applying code to stop the errors.
Use Antigravity to visualize the data flow; seeing the object structure often reveals the bug before the compiler does.
If Claude Code suggests a complex refactor, ask it to 'simplify to the most readable version' to keep your codebase maintainable.
Treat your error logs as data points; collect them to identify patterns in your coding style that lead to repetitive bugs.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your project, commit your changes, push to GitHub, and write a blog post about the 'Aha!' moment you had during the process.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow to turn any bug into a learning opportunity. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
